problem.title: CLINS trade-off on the public ROS1 HDL-400 window with synthesized per-point time
problem.question: Which CLINS profile should stay as the current default when the public ROS1 HDL-400 bag is reconstructed with scan-order synthetic point timestamps?

dataset.reference_role: public reference trajectory converted from pose_trace.csv
dataset.timestamp_note: The public ROS1 bag lacks a native time field, so per-point time is synthesized from scan order.

variants.label: Default
variants.intent: Repository default CLINS front-end density on the public HDL-400 ROS1 reconstruction.
variants.note: Continuous-time LiDAR-inertial SLAM with CT-LIO registration (GT-seeded initialization).
variants.readability_note: Uses the default CLI surface only.
variants.extensibility_note: No extra profile knobs beyond the stable core contract.
variants.decision_reason: Useful for comparison, but not strong enough to replace the current default.

variants.label: Fast
variants.intent: Use coarser source downsampling and fewer retained points for lighter continuous-time registration.
variants.note: Continuous-time LiDAR-inertial SLAM with CT-LIO registration (GT-seeded initialization).
variants.readability_note: Adds only boolean toggles on top of the stable CLI.
variants.extensibility_note: Still stays inside the stable CLI, but expands the toggle surface.
variants.decision_reason: Useful for comparison, but not strong enough to replace the current default.

variants.label: Dense
variants.intent: Use finer source downsampling and retain more points for denser continuous-time registration.
variants.note: Continuous-time LiDAR-inertial SLAM with CT-LIO registration (GT-seeded initialization).
variants.readability_note: Adds only boolean toggles on top of the stable CLI.
variants.extensibility_note: Still stays inside the stable CLI, but expands the toggle surface.
variants.decision_reason: Best combined benchmark score on the shared dataset and interface.
